name: Automoji
short_description: Automoji is a Auto-Battle, roguelike, strategy game with over 130 Emoji-based units to explore. Build your team, plan your route, and defeat waves of enemies! Unlock new items and unit packs to use on future runs!
detailed_description:
Automoji is a Auto-Battle, roguelike, strategy game where you buy, upgrade, and position your Emoji units!

  • Unlock all 4 packs containing 130+ unique units!
  • Find and combine the effects of 50+ items!
  • Plan the best route on your uniquely generated map each run!
  • Earn XP to unlock new items to find in future runs!
  • Swap out your units to find endless synergies!
  • Optimize your formation at the start of each battle!
  • Fight formations of increasingly difficult enemies!
  • Power up and combine your units to out-scale your foes!

Automoji's OST was composed by Vincent Colavita: the artist behind the soundtracks for games such as Luck be a Landlord, Red Ronin, and many more!
Check out Vincent's other work at

Automoji is a solo development project by Karl and was fully released after almost a year of Early Access. Please send any QOL or balance feedback via Discord and Twitter. I'm always looking for ways to make Automoji more fun!

Thank you for playing!!
